---
title: "HemodynamECMOnitoring-VA"
author: "Bernhard Nagler"
format: html
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
echo: false
warning: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(gtsummary)
library(labelled)
library(lubridate)
library(ggpubr)
library(easystats)
library(gt)
library(knitr)
library(pROC)
```

```{r}
#| include: FALSE

source("01_import.R")
# External labelling function 
source("02_labels.R")
```

```{r}
df_full <- df_ready %>%
  apply_study_labels()

df_tp1 <- df_full %>%
  filter(source_sheet == "Timepoint_01")
```

#### Table 1 - Baseline Parameters

```{r}
# write_delim(head(df_tp1), "head_df_tp1.csv", delim = ";")
```

```{r}
df_tp1 %>%
  select(Alter, Geschlecht, height, weight, bmi, ibw, bsa, sapsiii, sofa_admission, icu_diagnosis_cat, cannula_drain_site, cannula_return_site) %>%
  tbl_summary(type = list(
      c(Alter, height, weight, bmi, bsa, ibw, sapsiii, sofa_admission) ~ "continuous",
      c(Geschlecht, icu_diagnosis_cat, cannula_drain_site, cannula_return_site) ~ "categorical"
    ),
    missing = "ifany",
    missing_text = "Missing"
  ) %>%
  add_n()
```
#### ROC Analysis
```{r}
# 1. ROC for PLR-induced change in TTE VTI
roc_tte <- roc(response = df_tp1$responsive_fluid_vti, 
               predictor = df_tp1$change_plr_vti_perc,
               ci = TRUE, plot = TRUE)

# 2. ROC for PLR-induced change in PCA SV
roc_pca <- roc(response = df_tp1$responsive_fluid_vti, 
               predictor = df_tp1$change_plr_pca_sv_perc,
               ci = TRUE, plot = TRUE)

# 3. ROC for PLR-induced change in etCO2
roc_etco2_abs <- roc(response = df_tp1$responsive_fluid_vti, 
                 predictor = df_tp1$change_plr_etco2_abs,
                 ci = TRUE, plot = TRUE)
 
```
```{r}
# Table 2 ROC Results:
# Updated Function to handle both Percentage and Absolute thresholds
get_roc_stats_v2 <- function(roc_obj, name, is_absolute = FALSE) {
  best_coords <- coords(roc_obj, "best", ret = c("threshold", "sensitivity", "specificity"))
  
  # Logic: If it's a percentage (like 1.15), convert to 15%. 
  # If it's absolute (like 2.5 mmHg), keep it as 2.5.
  display_threshold <- if(is_absolute) {
    best_coords$threshold 
  } else {
    (best_coords$threshold - 1) * 100
  }
  
  data.frame(
    Method = name,
    AUC = as.numeric(roc_obj$auc),
    AUC_LCI = roc_obj$ci[1],
    AUC_UCI = roc_obj$ci[3],
    Best_Threshold = display_threshold,
    Unit = if(is_absolute) "mmHg" else "% change",
    Sensitivity = best_coords$sensitivity,
    Specificity = best_coords$specificity
  )
}

# Combine results with specific flags
roc_summary_table <- rbind(
  get_roc_stats_v2(roc_tte, "TTE (VTI)", is_absolute = FALSE),
  get_roc_stats_v2(roc_pca, "PCA (SV)", is_absolute = FALSE),
  get_roc_stats_v2(roc_etco2_abs, "etCO2 (Abs)", is_absolute = TRUE)
)

print(roc_summary_table)

```

##### Comparing ROC Curves (Hanley-McNeil Method)
```{r}
# Compare TTE vs PCA
comp_tte_pca <- roc.test(roc_tte, roc_pca, method = "delong")
print(comp_tte_pca$p.value)

# Compare TTE vs etCO2
comp_tte_etco2 <- roc.test(roc_tte, roc_etco2, method = "delong")
print(comp_tte_etco2$p.value)
```
#### Figure ROC Curves
```{r}
plot(roc_tte, col = "blue", main = "ROC Curves: Predicting Fluid Responsiveness via PLR")
plot(roc_pca, col = "red", add = TRUE)
plot(roc_etco2, col = "green", add = TRUE)

legend("bottomright", 
       legend = c(paste0("TTE (AUC: ", round(roc_tte$auc, 2), ")"),
                  paste0("PCA (AUC: ", round(roc_pca$auc, 2), ")"),
                  paste0("etCO2 (AUC: ", round(roc_etco2$auc, 2), ")")),
       col = c("blue", "red", "green"), lwd = 2)
```
